---
title: "Statistical Analysis Plan"
author: "Jonas Munk Jensen"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Intro:

This is a working document, where I will continually work on the statistical analysis plan. In this document I will note all decitions that are being made, work on scripts and write out the analysisplan

### Mapping


#### Creating exposure variables

```{r}
hicd <- hicd_map
# Has your healthcare provider, within the past 5 years, referred you to a consultation or a programme run by the municipality?
re
```


## Plan
My initial thought is to create a simulated/mock dataset 

```{r}
# Setting the random seed
set.seed(987654321)
rpois(5, 10)
```
